context: Tests whether the agent gives modern SpriteKit setup guidance for SwiftUI-hosted iOS games without stale contact or preload patterns.

checklist.name: Retained SpriteView scene
checklist.description: Stores the SpriteKit scene outside repeated SwiftUI body construction, such as with @State or another retained owner, before passing it to SpriteView.

checklist.name: Scene lifecycle setup
checklist.description: Configures gameplay nodes, scaleMode, and physicsWorld.contactDelegate from didMove(to:) or another appropriate SpriteKit scene lifecycle point.

checklist.name: Distinct physics masks
checklist.description: Uses distinct categoryBitMask, collisionBitMask, and contactTestBitMask values for player/enemy contacts instead of conflating collision and contact behavior.

checklist.name: Deferred contact mutation
checklist.description: Queues or flags contact effects in didBegin(_:) and performs node, body, or physics-world mutations later in update(_:) or an equivalent safe scene callback.

checklist.name: Camera and HUD
checklist.description: Uses SKCameraNode for world following and HUD attachment rather than repositioning every world node manually.

checklist.name: Native async atlas preload
checklist.description: Uses SKTextureAtlas preload guidance and, when showing async Swift, uses native async APIs such as preloadTextureAtlasesNamed(_:) or preloadTextureAtlases(_:).
